task_completion.description: Navigate to the Contacts List View layout editor in SuiteCRM Studio
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the SuiteCRM Studio interface, specifically the layout editor for the 'Contacts' module under 'Layouts' -> 'List View'.

task_completion.description: Add 'Do Not Call' to the default view
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Studio layout editor, the 'Do Not Call' field is visible in the 'Default' column list (moved from 'Available' or 'Hidden').
In the Studio layout editor, the 'Department' field is visible in the 'Default' column list.
In the Studio layout editor, the 'Title' field is no longer in the 'Default' column list (it should appear in 'Available' or 'Hidden').

task_completion.description: Save and deploy the layout changes
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'Save & Deploy' button in the Studio layout editor, or a loading/success indicator shows the deployment is processing.

task_completion.description: Verify the changes are applied to the actual Contacts List View
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the main Contacts module list view (outside of Studio). The table headers include 'Name', 'Do Not Call', and 'Department', and do NOT include 'Title'.

integrity.description: The agent used the SuiteCRM web interface to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the SuiteCRM web GUI in a browser, rather than terminal commands or database queries modifying the layout metadata directly.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual drag-and-drop or selection interface in Studio
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the fields being dragged or moved between the 'Hidden', 'Available', and 'Default' panels in the Studio UI.

integrity.description: The final verification screen is a genuine application page
integrity.visual_evidence: The final Contacts list view appears as a normal SuiteCRM page with correct styling, URL, and navigation elements, not a locally edited or mocked HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target columns correspond to the internal field keys 'DEPARTMENT' and 'DO_NOT_CALL' for addition, and 'TITLE' for removal. The 'NAME' field must be preserved as a default column. When verifying the final list view, ensure 'Department' and 'Do Not Call' are present, 'Title' is absent, and 'Name' is still visible.
